tasks.title: Add validation for task dependency edge cases
evidence: validation.rs:268-359 validates dependencies (existence, self-reference, cycles)
No validation that dependencies are not in 'rejected' status
No warning for deeply nested dependency chains (performance risk)
No check for dependencies on tasks that will never complete (blocked)
TaskStatus enum in contracts/task.rs has Rejected variant to check against
Config contracts support adding new queue validation thresholds
plan: Add validation to warn when tasks depend on rejected tasks
Add configurable max dependency depth check to QueueConfig
Add validation for dependencies on tasks with no execution path (blocked chains)
Add unit tests in validation/tests.rs for edge case dependency validations
Update docs/queue-and-tasks.md with dependency validation rules
notes: Current validation at lines 268-359 checks: self-reference, existence, cycles via DFS
Rejected tasks are currently allowed as dependencies - may want to warn instead of error

tasks.title: Add export command for task data
evidence: No way to export task data for external analysis or reporting
Users may want to export to CSV, JSON, or other formats
Queue data is JSON but not easily consumable by spreadsheet tools
Useful for project retrospectives and metrics analysis
plan: Create 'ralph export' command with format options
Support CSV, TSV, and JSON output formats
Allow filtering by status, tags, date range
Include all task fields in export
Add examples to docs/cli.md

tasks.title: Fix TUI app state being too large and unfocused
evidence: app.rs is very large (exceeds 110KB, truncated in output)
App struct handles too many responsibilities
File size heuristic suggests it should be split (~400 LOC guideline)
Complexity makes testing and maintenance difficult
plan: Extract filter state management to separate module
Extract palette/command palette logic to separate module
Extract task builder state to separate module
Keep app.rs focused on coordination only
Run 'make ci' to verify no behavior changes

tasks.title: Add dry-run mode for task operations
evidence: No way to preview task operations before applying them
Users may want to see what 'ralph task update' would change
Risk of unintended modifications to task queue
Other CLI tools commonly provide --dry-run for safety
plan: Add --dry-run flag to task update command
Add --dry-run flag to task edit command
Show proposed changes without modifying queue.json
Use diff-like output to highlight changes
Document dry-run usage in docs/cli.md

tasks.title: Add task templates for common task types
evidence: Creating tasks from scratch is repetitive
Common patterns: bug fix, feature, refactor, test, documentation
Users may want pre-filled templates with appropriate tags/scope
Would speed up task creation and ensure consistency
plan: Create 'ralph task template' subcommand
Define built-in templates for common task types
Allow custom templates in .ralph/templates/
Support template variables (date, user, etc.)
Add template listing and preview commands
